page_content:
Total Credits

18

1 Not counting internship courses (PHIL386).

2 See https://philosophy.umd.edu/academic-programs/undergraduate- program/philosophy-major (https://philosophy.umd.edu/academic- programs/undergraduate-program/philosophy-major/) for a list of philosophy courses that can be used to satisfy the various distributive requirements.

For a course to count toward a student's minor, the grade in the course must be "C-" or above. For students who matriculated in September 2012 or later, the average of all grades counted toward the minor must be 2.0 or greater. Therefore, grades of "C-" will have to be balanced with higher grades. ("C-" counts as 1.7 toward the GPA).

Philosophy Minor 1
